description: Northwind FY26 annual brand campaign, signed ceiling $180K. Ran and delivered in months 1-2, then closed out. Final invoicing landed at $150K; the campaign came in UNDER the signed ceiling and is finished, so the remaining $30K will never be billed or spent. lifecycle=closed — no further spend on this engagement.
Routine month-3 content work (blog/social). Small SOW, $4K signed, not yet billed. The only genuinely forward commitment left on this budget.
